texto: Within this confusion a few fundamentals remain constant:a. A strong belief is more important than a few facts.b. The stronger the belief, the fewer the facts.c. The fewer the facts, the more people killed.
explicacao: Citação de Milton A. Rothhman sobre temas ligados a fe. “Within this confusion a few fundamentals remain constant:a. A strong belief is more important tha…” articula fe, belief, religion em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como religion.
